_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your vault paths. config.json is NOT committed to git.

_fields.vaults: List of Obsidian vaults. Each entry needs a 'name' and 'path'.
_fields.active_vault: The name of the vault to save notes to by default.
_fields.api_port: The local port the API listens on. Default: 8765.
_fields.allowed_origins: CORS allowed origins for browser access. chrome-extension:// is always allowed automatically.
_fields.log_level: Log verbosity: warning (default), info, debug. Use 'info' or 'debug' to troubleshoot issues.
_fields.log_file: Path to log file. Leave empty to write web-note-clipper.log next to the exe.
